bird.name: Visayan pygmy babbler
bird.summary: The Visayan pygmy babbler (Dasycrotapha pygmaea) is a bird species endemic to the Philippines on the islands of Leyte and Samar. It was con…

relations.subject: Visayan pygmy babbler
relations.evidence: It has been assessed as Near-threatened by the International Union for Conservation of Nature with the population continuing to decline due to habitat loss from illegal logging, land-conversion and slash-and-burn
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
